description: Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/tui-cleanup-merger/ksau-ts-55bd. Agent: tui-cleanup-merger. Conflicting files: .

title: Suppress OpenPGP fallback stderr noise
rationale: Wrap openpgp.decrypt in try/finally that swaps console.error to no-op during call and restores original immediately after to keep CLI output clean without changing decryption behavior.

name: progress-math-guards
description: Progress display code should guard invalid math paths: return 0.0 B for non-finite/negative byte values, compute percent with total > 0 checks, and compute speed only when elapsed > 0.

title: Avoid Bun resp.json SIMD parser path
rationale: Bun v1.3.9 can SIGFPE on Graph API JSON with large integers when using Response.json(); parsing via JSON.parse(await response.text()) avoids the crash path while keeping payload semantics.

title: Use Commander parseAsync in CLI entrypoint
rationale: Async command handlers (upload action) must be awaited; parse() can let process exit early in Bun compiled binary teardown.

title: Drain uploadChunk success responses in Bun
rationale: Bun can crash during FetchTasklet teardown if upload success responses are returned without consuming the body.

title: Eagerly materialize upload chunk Blob before fetch
rationale: Passing Blob lazily into fetch can leave file-backed body resources dangling during Bun FetchTasklet teardown; resolving to ArrayBuffer first avoids cleanup crashes.

content: All five ksau-ts-8669 runtime crash fixes verified together in compiled binary: (1) OpenPGP console.error suppression in crypto/algo.ts decrypt(), (2) progress formatBytes Infinity guard, (3) JSON.parse(await resp.text()) in all azure fetch paths, (4) Blob.arrayBuffer() eager materialization before PUT, (5) success response body drain. Repro './ksau-ts upload -f CLAUDE.md -r oned' exits 0, no debug noise, no SIGFPE.

src/cmd/tui.ts: pure utility module with no imports — formatBytesHuman(bigint, 3dp binary) and formatBytesSpeed(number, 1dp binary /s with non-finite guard). Direct port from src/azure/quota.ts formatBytes.

src/cmd/tui.ts complete: 6 exports — formatBytesHuman(bigint), formatBytesSpeed(number), formatDuration(ms), fmtPath(p), SpeedTracker class (5-sample rolling window, reset()/update()), and picocolors named re-exports (dim/green/red/yellow/cyan/bold/gray). Double quotes, 2-space indent per biome config. Biome --write also touches progress.ts; revert that to stay single-file per spec.

src/cmd simple commands (version, listRemotes, refresh, quota, help) all use @clack/prompts: intro/outro wraps every action, cancel+process.exit(1) on errors, spinner for async ops, log.step for list items, log.message for multi-line output, note for help text blocks. No console.log anywhere in these 5 files.

description: biome lint on progress.ts (progress/progress.ts line 88) has a pre-existing line-length formatting violation that predates ksau-ts-0e19. bun run lint on the whole src dir fails.
resolution: Lint only changed files: bunx biome check src/cmd/version.ts src/cmd/listRemotes.ts ... to verify target files pass without touching pre-existing violations.

content: Upload TUI overhaul (ksau-ts-71ef): @clack/prompts@1.0.1 provides progress({style:'heavy',max:number}).advance(step,msg) for upload bar — step is DELTA not cumulative. box(msg,title) for download URL display. Interactive remote select via select() with free-space hints sorted descending. Non-TTY falls back to auto-select-max-free-space. verifyFileIntegrity uses spinner().start/message/stop. UploadLogger type in types.ts routes azure/upload.ts logs through optional callback. All quality gates: tsc --noEmit + biome check src pass.

ov merge fails at ai-resolve tier when .mulch JSONL expertise files have concurrent-append conflicts from multiple agents. Workaround: cherry-pick only the source commits (skip mulch-update commits) onto main directly. The mulch records from skipped commits are lost but acceptable — src/ changes land cleanly.

picocolors was added as a dependency for tui.ts color re-exports (dim/green/red/yellow/cyan/bold/gray). After cleanup, those re-exports were unused by any cmd/ file and were removed. picocolors was subsequently removed from package.json. If color functions are needed in future commands, import pc from picocolors directly in that file rather than via tui.ts re-exports.

Upload TUI (ksau-ts-9394): logger.info must be no-op during progress phase to prevent @clack progress() bar corruption; logger.warn kept for retry visibility. Guard download URL box behind non-empty baseURL — base_url field can be absent from rclone config; empty string produces broken relative-path URL.
